description: Letter/petition from Moshe [...] to the "Nagid" [Shelo]mo. Begins in Hebrew, and transitions to Judaeo-Arabic. Probably this is a letter of appeal for charity or help. The bottom part of the letter is lost. Unclear who this Shelomo is.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
